atomicity.message: Staged payload implements only the OXP canonical prompt-bank content for project-readiness-kit-oxp-prompt-bank-content-f6l.

conditions.message: The staged prompt-bank content slice is diff-clean, gofmt-clean, and passes focused plus full Go tests in an isolated staged-slice worktree.
evidence: git diff --cached --check produced no output for the staged prompt-bank slice.

gofmt -l on cmd/burpvalve/prompts_test.go, internal/backpressure/prompt_bank.go, and internal/backpressure/prompt_bank_test.go printed no files; focused prompt tests and go test ./... passed in an isolated worktree.

conditions.message: Prompt content is centralized in the prompt bank and does not duplicate large workflow dumps.
evidence: Staged internal/backpressure/prompt_bank.go contains one promptBank slice with PromptDefinition entries and short bodies.
Searches for required prompt names and bootstrap terms found the content in the prompt bank, while CLI test changes only assert command behavior.

conditions.message: The verifier prompts reinforce evidence and packet binding instead of self-certification.
evidence: Staged verifier-bootstrap text instructs reading AGENTS and backpressure docs, macro_start_session, inbox polling, packet-priority, exact verdicts, and concrete read-only evidence.
Staged verifier-brief says never claim tests, file reads, subagent checks, pane wakes, or approvals not observed.

conditions.message: The larger prompt bank has direct focused tests for required names, verifier-bootstrap content, stable listing, paste safety, and hostile rendering.
evidence: Staged prompt_bank_test.go defines requiredPromptNames with all twelve required names and tests stable list metadata.
Verifier-bootstrap content tests and paste-safety hostile-rendering tests passed in focused internal and CLI test runs.

conditions.message: The staged payload satisfies the OXP prompt-bank bead requirements and passes targeted and full checks.
evidence: The bead contract lists twelve required prompt names plus verifier-bootstrap onboarding requirements, paste-safety, and hostile rendering.
Clean staged snapshot checks confirmed twelve prompts including verifier-bootstrap, required onboarding text in show JSON, focused tests, and go test ./... all passed.

conditions.message: Verifier response records binding hash, staged paths, isolated worktree, focused/full commands, prompt list/show checks, and direct code inspection.
evidence: Packet reproduction and git diff --cached --name-status observed exactly three staged files: prompts_test.go, prompt_bank.go, and prompt_bank_test.go.
Recorded checks include prompts list JSON, verifier-bootstrap show JSON, paste-safety grep, focused prompt tests, and go test ./... in an isolated staged-slice worktree.

conditions.message: The staged slice is limited to the packet-listed prompt-bank implementation and tests.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status showed only cmd/burpvalve/prompts_test.go, internal/backpressure/prompt_bank.go, and internal/backpressure/prompt_bank_test.go staged.
Unrelated scaffold and log work remained unstaged; staged-slice verification used keep-index stash and go test ./... .

conditions.message: The staged payload changes embedded prompt definitions and tests only; it adds no filesystem mutation, process execution, mail sending, pane control, or export behavior.
evidence: Staged prompt_bank.go appends PromptDefinition entries inside the in-memory promptBank slice.
Regex over staged diff for os.WriteFile, os.Mkdir, os.Remove, os.Rename, os.OpenFile, os.Create, and exec.Command found no new prompt-bank behavior.

conditions.message: The prompt bank exposes expected stable prompt names and metadata, verifier-bootstrap renders required onboarding content, and hostile values remain literal data.
evidence: prompts list --json returned all twelve stable names, including commit-choreography, verifier-bootstrap, verifier-brief, and verifier-packet-relay.

prompts show verifier-bootstrap --json produced required variables and body text containing AGENTS/backpressure, macro_start_session, contact confirmation, inbox polling, Packet-priority rule, verdict values, and schema pointer.

conditions.message: Prompt rendering keeps hostile values as data and prompt bodies avoid shell-hazard patterns.
evidence: Staged TestPromptBankPasteSafetyAndHostileRendering rejects prompt bodies containing arrow tokens or the reserved status token and renders hostile variable values literally across requiredPromptNames.
Clean snapshot grep found the reserved status token only in hostile test fixtures and assertions, not prompt bodies; focused tests passed.

conditions.message: No governed visual surface is present; the staged payload changes embedded CLI prompt content and tests only.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status lists only cmd/burpvalve/prompts_test.go, internal/backpressure/prompt_bank.go, and internal/backpressure/prompt_bank_test.go.
Staged hunks add no browser UI, CSS, canvas, Bubble Tea view, screenshots, VHS assets, terminal recording, or visual-rendering surface.

conditions.message: The change expands static embedded prompt data to twelve entries while runtime behavior remains bounded list/sort/scan/string replacement over a small in-memory bank.
evidence: Staged diff adds PromptDefinition literals to the existing promptBank slice and adds no loops beyond existing ListPromptBank, ShowPrompt, and RenderPrompt behavior.
List JSON confirmed bank size is twelve; rendering uses existing declared-variable replacement; full go test ./... passed.

conditions.message: Prompt content gives coordination guidance without converting Burpvalve into an autonomous actor; the command only renders prompt text.
evidence: Verifier-bootstrap, verifier-brief, and verifier-packet-relay bodies tell agents to gather real evidence and not treat terminal wakes as verdicts.
No staged code path sends Agent Mail, spawns panes or subagents, or executes those instructions.
